the_cleansing_set: Cut the mud, cut the pain / Washing the spectrum inside of the brain
Surgical logic, surgical strike / Everything I am and everything you like
Zero-point-zero: the clean and the pure / Finding the frequency, finding the cure
the_balance_set: Balance the shadow, balance the light / In the frequency heart of the digital night
High-shelf rising to the fractal sun / Low-shelf standing where the world is begun
Golden ratio, locked to the beat / Making the spectrum finally complete
the_spectral_dialogue: Weight the air / Clear the floor
I am the prayer / I am the door

psychoacoustic_EQ_v4.the_focus_notch: Dynamic EQ dip @ 2.5kHz on the pads when the lead-synth is active
psychoacoustic_EQ_v4.the_sub_harmonic_glue: Boosting the 1st harmonic (104Hz) on the kick to 'connect' it to the sub
